Name: Marcus Webb
Flavor_Text: Fourteen years flying fixed-wing before switching to UAS. Still prefers a horizon.

Name: Priya Nair
Flavor_Text: Covers 10,000 acres a season. Knows every crop stress signature by color.

Name: Jordan Holt
Flavor_Text: Tracks raptor migration corridors. The birds don't mind her anymore.

Name: Dana Reyes
Flavor_Text: Former EMT. Runs SAR operations across three county jurisdictions.

Name: Eli Fontaine
Flavor_Text: Specializes in bridge and tower inspection. Never uses a ladder anymore.

Name: Simone Adler
Flavor_Text: Her reel includes three feature films and a Super Bowl spot.

Name: Kwame Osei
Flavor_Text: Monitors wetland health along the Gulf Coast. Published in three journals.

Name: Tara Singh
Flavor_Text: Wrote the airspace deconfliction protocol used by six fire agencies.

Name: Ben Calloway
Flavor_Text: Combines NDVI data with soil reports. Farmers call him before they call the county.

Name: Yuki Tanaka
Flavor_Text: Handles everything from shot planning to post. One-person production unit.

Name: Rosa Delgado
Flavor_Text: Maps invasive species corridors across riparian zones in the Southwest.

Name: Finn O'Brien
Flavor_Text: Keeps the drones flying on offshore platforms. Salt air doesn't bother him.

Name: Celestine Vaux
Special_Instructions: Legendary. May direct one other operator each turn to redeploy their skill points to an active mission.
Flavor_Text: Twenty years in the field across four continents. Runs the room without raising her voice.

Name: Rajan Mehta
Special_Instructions: Legendary. When deployed on a mission with a Biology/Wildlife requirement of 3 or more draw an additional card.
Flavor_Text: Holds dual PhDs. His field notes are required reading at two universities.

Name: Atlas
Special_Instructions: Legendary. Cannot be upgraded. Counts as one skill point in all six categories. Cannot hold Ops Kit cards.
Flavor_Text: No operator on file. Deployed remotely. Always on time.

Name: Commander Lena Cross
Special_Instructions: Legendary. Cannot be upgraded. When Cross completes a mission all opponents skip their next draw phase.
Flavor_Text: Decorated military aviator. Transitioned to civilian UAS ops and never looked back.
